title: Management Buyouts: What is the primary motivation for a management buyout (MBO)?...
summary: Identify the primary motivation for management buyouts as gaining private control of the company.
prompt: What is the primary motivation for a management buyout (MBO)?

options.text: The primary motivation for an MBO is often for managers to gain control of the

solution: The primary motivation for an MBO is often for managers to gain control of the company or its division, allowing them to operate it privately.
